title: Google ads integration issues
excerpt: When I wanna integrate google ads into Monday, it keeps popping up a window that says something like "internal server error after I click Sign in with Google. Is there anyone who know how to fix this?

posts.author: Gin (Liang Jiying)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I wanna integrate google ads into Monday, it keeps popping up a window that says something like "internal server error after I click Sign in with Google. Is there anyone who know how to fix this?

posts.author: yesjerryer (Jerry Erler)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re still encountering an “internal server error” when attempting to integrate Google Ads into Monday, there could be several potential causes for this issue. Here are a few steps you can try to resolve the problem:

  1. Clear your browser cache: Start by clearing your browser’s cache and cookies. Sometimes, stored data can interfere with the integration process. Once cleared, try logging in again.

  2. Try a different browser or incognito mode: Attempt the integration using a different browser or open an incognito/private browsing window. This step helps determine if the issue is specific to your browser settings or extensions.

  3. Disable browser extensions: Temporarily disable any browser extensions, such as ad blockers or privacy tools, which might interfere with the integration process. Then, attempt the integration again.

  4. Check your Google account permissions: Ensure that your Google account has the necessary permissions to integrate with Monday. Verify that your account has the appropriate access and permissions to connect with Google Ads.

  5. Contact Monday support: If the issue persists after attempting the above steps, reach out to Monday’s support team directly. They will have access to specific information about your account and can provide you with tailored assistance to resolve the problem.

Remember, technical issues can sometimes arise from updates or changes in the platforms themselves, so it’s possible that the problem may be on Monday’s end. In such cases, contacting their support team is crucial for troubleshooting and obtaining a resolution.

Please note that my knowledge cutoff is September 2021, so if there have been any recent changes or updates to the integration process between Google Ads and Monday, it’s advisable to consult the official documentation or reach out to Monday’s support for the most up-to-date information. If you’re interested in digital marketing, you can explore this website for valuable insights and resources in the field.

posts.author: KarolB (Karol)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Karol,

Thanks for bringing this issue with the Google Ads Integration to our attention.

Unfortunately, this is an ongoing issue with the platform at the moment, and while we aim to provide the highest quality possible, at the moment we are unable to provide an immediate resolution to the product area of this specific feature.

We apologize for the inconvenience this causes to your workflow, and we’ll go ahead and report this issue to our development team.

While we cannot offer a timeline on when this will be resolved, we certainly understand how this has affected your experience and we’ve not only included the technical details of your report but also the individual details of your experience and your specific workflow so this can be top of mind.

Thanks in advance for your understanding - feel free to let me know if you have any additional questions or comments!

Best,
Gabby

posts.author: Carrie (Carrie Downey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has this Google Ads app ever recovered? I’m not able to find it in the marketplace.

Does anyone have a solution that would bring the data from Google Ads and Meta ads into monday.com to track ad spend and results of ads?

posts.author: kashif90 (Kashif)
posts.cookedHtml: In order to address this “internal server error” problem while integrating Google Ads with Monday, you must start by clearing the cookies and cache of your browser. However, in case you still continue to face the issues you should check if there are any known service disruptions or maintenance schedules for either Google Ads or Monday platforms. While you must also ensure that you possess all the required permissions and access levels to connect the two accounts. If you still continue to face the error, it is best to consult with either Mondayor Google Ads expert agency as they can guide you in resolving this issue in a more effective manner.

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone.

It does seem like monday’s native Google Ads integration is no longer supported, so I’ve added one to the Data Importer app. You can import Google Ads as well as other channels like Facebook, Instagram, Google Analytics etc.

I’ve made a tutorial specific for Google Ads too.

Happy to answer any questions!

posts.author: banerpunep (samsami)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s a clear list of guidelines for Google Ads integration with Monday .com

1. Setup & Access

  • Ensure you have admin rights in both Google Ads and Monday. com.

  • Use a Google Ads Manager Account if you’re managing multiple campaigns.

  • Enable API access in Google Ads (if using custom integrations).

2. Integration Options

  • Use Monday.com’s native integrations (via Monday Apps Marketplace).

  • Or connect through Zapier / Make (Integromat) for custom workflows.

  • For advanced tracking, consider using Google Ads API + Monday. com API.

3. Data Mapping

  • Map key Google Ads metrics (e.g., Impressions, Clicks, Conversions, Cost per Click).

  • Align these metrics with Monday. com boards, columns, and dashboards.

  • Ensure naming conventions in Monday. com match campaign/ad group structures.

4. Automation Rules

  • Auto-create items in Monday. com when a new Google Ads campaign/ad group is launched.

  • Set triggers (e.g., “If CPC > X, update Monday. com item status to Review”).

  • Automate budget tracking and conversion goals.

5. Dashboards & Reporting

  • Use Monday. com Dashboards to visualize ad performance (CPC, CTR, ROI).

  • Combine Google Ads + CRM data in Monday. com for lead attribution.

  • Schedule weekly reports to stakeholders directly from Monday.

6. Compliance & Permissions

  • Follow Google Ads data-sharing policies.

  • Limit sensitive data visibility in Monday. com to authorized team members.

  • Ensure GDPR / data privacy compliance when syncing customer data.

7. Optimization Best Practices

  • Sync negative keywords, budget alerts, and A/B testing results into Monday.

  • Use custom fields in Monday to track campaign objectives vs. outcomes.

  • Regularly audit integration to avoid data sync errors.

By Team Penieltech. (for helping purpose only)
